---
title: Master in Data Science for Health and Social Care
description: |
  **Delivery mode:** Online (Distance learning)
  
  **Duration:** 3 years
image: jason-leung-ncLdDcvrcfw-unsplash.jpg
site-url: https://shortcourses.ed.ac.uk/course/natural-language-processing-nlp-1-in-r-for-health-and-social-care
listing:
  - id: msc-courses
    contents: "msc-courses"
    type: grid
    categories: true
    sort-ui: true
    filter-ui: true
    feed: 
      categories: [R, Quarto]
open-graph: true
twitter-card: true
draft: false
---
::: {.profile-image-float-left}
![](jason-leung-ncLdDcvrcfw-unsplash.jpg){fig-align="centre"}
:::
## About the course

## Courses

:::{#msc-courses}
:::
